name: Cricket Song
description: Evening crickets chirping in steady rhythm

prompts.label: evening crickets chirping in steady patient rhythm
prompts.text: evening crickets chirping in steady patient rhythm, forest clearing at dawn, wooden mallet on hollow log, morning dew stillness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, with natural decay
